projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Manage customers and domains, assign scans and analyses.
projects.deleteConfirm: Really delete this project? Assigned scans will remain and be unassigned.
projects.name: Name
projects.industryLegacyHint: Stored value is outside the current list: {{value}}. Pick an option above to replace it.
projects.emptyDomainScans: No domain scans in this project.
projects.emptyJourneyRuns: No UX journeys in this project.
projects.emptyGeoEeatRuns: No GEO/E-E-A-T analyses in this project.
projects.emptySingleScans: No single scans in this project.
projects.domainRequiredForGeo: Please set the project URL (domain) in company info first.
projects.domainRequiredForRankings: Please set the company URL on the project first (settings / company info).
projects.emptyRankings: No rank tracking keywords in this project.
projects.rankChartNoData: No position history yet. Run "Refresh rankings" to record data.
projects.serpPreviewNotRanked: Your site: not in top results
projects.serpPreviewNoData: No SERP data yet. Refresh rankings to capture Google results.
projects.competitorsDescription: Competitor domains for rank comparison and GEO/E-E-A-T. Used when refreshing rankings.
projects.geoQueriesDescription: Typical search queries for GEO/E-E-A-T runs (e.g. for AI search).
projects.rankingsUnconfigured: Rank tracking is not configured (SERP_API_KEY missing).
projects.rankingsRefresh502: Rank refresh failed. Check SERP_API_KEY and SERP_API_PROVIDER (serper or scrapingrobot).
projects.researchDescription: Structured insights for target groups, SEO and GEO. Run once, then edit and apply to project fields.
projects.pageTopicsCompareSubtitle: A shared topic matrix at the top (your domain plus every competitor with a completed scan) for quick live comparison; below that, the same per-domain detail cards as on domain results.
projects.pageTopicsCombinedDiagramCaption: Each circle is one theme from one source. Fill = highest tag tier (T1–T5); stroke color = source (see legend). Size reflects theme score.
projects.pageTopicsCompareBubbleTooltip: {{pages}} pages · max T{{maxTier}} · avg tier {{avgTier}} · score {{score}}
projects.pageTopicsCompareInteractionHint: Click a source in the legend to highlight only that brand. Click a bubble to connect the same normalized topic across sources (dashed line when it appears at least twice).
projects.pageTopicsCompareTagLinkHint: Same topic across {{count}} sources — line ordered by avg tier (left → right).
projects.pageTopicsCompareTooltipHint: Click the circle to link the same topics; click the legend to filter one source.
projects.pageTopicsCompareHint: Your domain: {{own}} pages with AI classification. Competitors with topic data: {{competitorsReady}} / {{competitorsTotal}}.
projects.pageTopicsCompareHintNoCompetitors: Add competitors and run deep scans to compare topic landscapes.
projects.pageTopicsCompetitorIncomplete: Deep scan not complete (status: {{status}}). Run or wait for a finished scan to see topics.

wcag.noScan: No deep scan for this project yet. Run a domain scan to see WCAG analysis.
wcag.scoreTooltip: Score = 100 minus weighted issues per page (errors×10, warnings×3, notices×1). Aligned with common tooling (e.g. Lighthouse/BrowserStack); WCAG does not define an official score formula.

seo.title: SEO on page
seo.noScan: No deep scan for this project yet. Run a domain scan to see on-page SEO analysis.
seo.overviewSubtitle: Title, meta description, H1, canonical and word count
seo.crossPageKeywordsSubtitle: Terms that appear on multiple pages; sorted by total count.
seo.pagesByContentSubtitle: Sorted by word count; under 300 words = skinny content.
seo.scoreTooltip: Formula: 40% meta coverage (title, meta description, H1, canonical), 30% heading structure (single H1, no skipped levels), 30% content depth (share of non-skinny pages, ≥300 words). Not an official standard; derived from deep-scan data.
seo.tableAria: SEO on-page table: all pages with meta, H1, structure and content.
seo.keywordsTableSubtitle: Terms that appear on multiple pages; sorted by count.

geoAnalysis.title: GEO / E-E-A-T Analysis
geoAnalysis.noRun: No completed GEO run. Start a run on the GEO page.
geoAnalysis.noDeepScan: No deep scan for this project. Run a domain scan to see E-E-A-T on-page analysis.

messages.passwordMismatch: New password and confirmation do not match.

standards.wcag2aa: Level AA - Recommended for most sites
standards.wcag2aaa: Level AAA - Highest level of accessibility

scan.title: New Scan
scan.subtitle: Enter a URL and run an automated WCAG accessibility check (Desktop, Tablet & Mobile).
scan.targetRegionPlaceholder: e.g. DE, EU – checks if server location matches
scan.singleHint: Analyzes exactly ONE page immediately (Sync). Includes screenshots & visual analysis.
scan.quickScanOption: Desktop only (one viewport, faster and less server load)
scan.deepHint: Analyzes the entire domain in the background (Async). Finds systemic issues.
scan.journeyHint: A browser agent navigates the site and completes a task you describe (e.g. find product X, add to cart).
scan.taskPlaceholder: e.g. Find product XY and add it to the cart
scan.journeyNotConfigured: UX Journey Agent service is not configured. Contact your administrator.
scan.journeyStatusRunning: Journey is running. The agent is navigating the site…
scan.journeyHistoryEmpty: No saved journeys yet. Start a journey above.
scan.geoEeatHint: Intensive analysis for Generative Search and E-E-A-T (Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, Trust). Optional: Competitive benchmark (visibility in LLMs vs. competitors).
scan.geoEeatHistoryEmpty: No analyses yet. Start an analysis above.
scan.geoEeatCompetitiveCheckbox: Check visibility in LLMs vs. competitors
scan.geoEeatQueriesPlaceholder: Best providers for X in region Y
scan.geoEeatSuggestEmpty: No suggestions received. Try again or enter manually.
scan.geoEeatSuggestTimeout: Request took too long. Please try again.
scan.geoEeatQuickHint: Checks LLM citations / share of voice for one question — without on-page analysis and without Google rankings.
scan.geoEeatQuickQuestionPlaceholder: e.g. Which providers are best for …?
scan.geoEeatQuickValidation: Please enter one question and one company (domain/URL).
scan.geoEeatQuickCompetitorInvalid: Could not parse a domain for the company. Enter a valid domain or URL.
scan.streamIncomplete: The scan response was incomplete. Please try again.
scan.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.
scan.analyzing: Loading and analyzing the page. This may take a few seconds…

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of all WCAG accessibility checks performed
dashboard.deleteDomainScanConfirm: Delete this deep scan? All associated single-page scans will be removed.
dashboard.searchNoResults: No results for "{query}". Change your search term or run more scans.

deepScans.title: Domain deep scans
deepScans.subtitle: All deep scans for your account. Filter, compare, or open a result.
deepScans.classificationListHint: Industry uses a fixed sector list (stored as IDs on the project). Tags still come from the project too. Scans without a project show “—”. Deploy tag sync copies only tags. Empty industry can be auto-suggested from page topics (Haiku) into a pool id; CHECKION_DISABLE_AUTO_PROJECT_INDUSTRY to disable.
deepScans.colPrivacyHint: Pages with policy / cookie banner / terms (counts vs total). Optional TCF / CMP signals.
deepScans.compareNeedTwo: Select exactly two scans to compare.
deepScans.compareInvalid: Invalid or incomplete comparison link. Please pick two scans from the registry.

developers.title: Developer API
developers.subtitle: Checkion isn't just a UI tool – it's a headless accessibility engine. Use our REST API to integrate accessibility checks into your CI/CD pipelines, build custom dashboards, or use our micro-tools programmatically.
developers.contrastDesc: Calculate WCAG contrast ratio between two colors.
developers.extractDesc: Headless scraper to extract content via selector.
developers.sslLabsDesc: SSL/TLS grade and certificate check (SSL Labs API).
developers.pagespeedDesc: Performance, Accessibility, SEO scores (Google PageSpeed API).
developers.scanListDesc: List paginated standalone scan summaries. Shared-project filters resolve owner-backed; omitted projectId returns all accessible scans, empty projectId only unassigned scans.
developers.scansDesc: Retrieve a history of recent single-page scans.
developers.scansLegacyDesc: Legacy raw standalone scan history. Includes accessible shared-project scans, but is not the preferred paginated dashboard list endpoint.
developers.scansDomainDesc: List deep domain scans (summaries). Optional: page, limit, q (domain substring), status, projectId (omit = all accessible; empty = unassigned only). Shared project filters resolve owner-backed.
developers.scansDomainCompareDesc: Compare two deep scans: JSON body with exactly two domain scan UUIDs in ids.
developers.scanDomainPostDesc: Trigger a deep domain scan (async). Uses sitemap URLs when available, otherwise link crawl. Body: url, optional useSitemap (true/false).
developers.deleteDesc: Delete a scan result from memory.

domain.title: Deep Domain Scan (Async)
domain.subtitle: Crawls your website in the background. If a sitemap is found (robots.txt or /sitemap.xml), its URLs are scanned; otherwise links are followed.
domain.startedLog: Scan started in background. Polling for updates...
domain.resumedLog: Resuming an in-progress scan — loading status…
domain.classifyPageTopicsOption: After a successful scan, re-run LLM page-topic classification in the background (extra usage)
domain.aiFillProjectMetadataOption: After the scan, suggest project industry and tags via AI from domain/themes (when empty or per overwrite env)

results.sessionPartialDevicesHint: This session has fewer than three device runs (e.g. quick scan = desktop only). No tablet/mobile results for this run.
results.heatmapError: Heatmap could not be generated (check service).
results.pageIndexNoData: No page index for this scan.
results.structureSemanticsCardSubtitle: Landmarks, headings, and optional page index — one list, no duplication.
results.structureMapFootnote: Landmarks (e.g. nav, main) are highlighted; headings are indented by level.
results.hoverToHighlight: Hover over a region to highlight it on the screenshot.
results.fixDocsAria: Open documentation and fix guide for this rule
results.pageClassificationTier5: Clearly dedicated to one core topic
results.overviewHint: Scan details, page topic, and Eco, Performance, and UX cards are shown above.
results.dwellEstimateHint: Model from text volume, readability, and interaction — not analytics.
results.formA11yLine: Missing autocomplete: {auto} · Suspicious type: {type} · aria-invalid without description: {aria}
results.contentFreshnessSubtitle: HTTP Last-Modified, JSON-LD dates, and Open Graph vs scan time
results.contentFreshnessNoDates: No dated signals were found (freshness unclear).
results.contentFreshnessNoteHtmlLongCache: HTML is configured with long cache — verify updates propagate as intended.
results.contentFreshnessNoteSourceSpread: Dated signals disagree by more than a week — treat recency as uncertain.

domainResult.notFound: This deep scan was not found or you don't have access. It may have been deleted.
domainResult.title: Deep Domain Scan
domainResult.classificationEmptyHint: This project has no industry or tags yet. Open the project and save them under Classification.
domainResult.pageTopicsCoverage: {{classified}} of {{total}} pages have AI classification (tags + tier).
domainResult.pageTopicsBubbleMatrixCaption: Each circle = one theme. Horizontal: average tier (1–5), vertical: page count. Size = weighted score. Color = highest tier.
domainResult.pageTopicsTierSpectrumCaption: A single strip showing each tier’s share of average tags per page (T1–T5) for the whole domain.
domainResult.pageTopicsBubbleTooltip: {{pages}} pages · max T{{maxTier}} · avg tier {{avgTier}} · score {{score}}
domainResult.pageTopicsBubbleTooltipClick: Click the circle to compare tier mix for pages that mention this theme.
domainResult.pageTopicsClickBubbleHint: Tip: click a circle to focus a theme and optionally compare its tier spectrum.
domainResult.pageTopicsTierSpectrumCaptionTheme: Same metric as above, but averaged only over pages where this theme appears (all tags on those pages).
domainResult.pageTopicsTierMix: Avg tags per page by tier
domainResult.pageTopicsCorePages: {{count}} pages with at least one core topic (T5)
domainResult.pageTopicsLowTierDominant: {{count}} pages: peripheral tags outweigh core-topic tags
domainResult.linksMostBrokenTitle: Pages with the most broken links
domainResult.linksSeoMetaCardIntro: Title, meta description, and H1 coverage; sample URLs missing meta descriptions.
domainResult.linksSeoDupMetasSubtitle: Same meta description (normalized) on multiple URLs
domainResult.linksSeoCanonicalMismatchSubtitle: Canonical does not match the page URL
domainResult.linksSeoHreflangConflict: x-default hreflang points to different targets
domainResult.uxAuditLabLongTasks: {count} long tasks total, max duration {maxMs} ms ({pages}/{total} pages affected).
domainResult.uxAuditLabScriptKb: Avg. script transfer (estimate): ~{kb} KB per page.
domainResult.linksSeoKeywordsCardIntro: Terms appearing on multiple pages; sorted by total occurrences (top 25).
domainResult.linksSeoLinksStatsCardIntro: Aggregates from the deep scan; highlighted metric = total broken links.
domainResult.linksSeoMostBrokenCardTitle: Pages with the most broken links
domainResult.linksSeoMostBrokenCardIntro: Top 10 by broken link count per URL.
domainResult.linksSeoEmpty: No SEO or link data available.
domainResult.linksSeoSectionSubtitle: On-page SEO (meta, keywords, density) and link aggregates from the deep scan.
domainResult.uxAuditSubtitle: Roll-up metrics across all scanned URLs plus prioritized pages — so you fix where impact is highest first.
domainResult.uxAuditDwellHint: Mean of per-page model estimates — not analytics.
domainResult.uxAuditHeadingsHint: {multiH1} pages with H1 issues · {skipped} with skipped heading levels (out of {total} pages with UX data).
domainResult.uxAuditSectionPriorityIntro: Weakest pages first. Click or press Enter to open the single-page scan with screenshots and full UX metrics.
domainResult.uxAuditSectionConsoleIntro: JavaScript console errors reported during the scan — often broken scripts or third-party issues.
domainResult.uxAuditSectionTapIntro: Tap targets below the recommended minimum — matters for mobile and accessibility.
domainResult.uxAuditSectionFocusIntro: Pages where tab / focus order stood out in the scan.
domainResult.uxAuditEmpty: No UX data available for the scanned pages.
domainResult.uxAuditReadabilityIntro: Estimated US grade level of body copy per page — lower is easier to read. The domain average includes only pages that produced a readability score.
domainResult.uxAuditReadabilityRange: Average {avg} (range {min}–{max}) · readability on {withData} of {total} pages with UX data.
domainResult.uxAuditReadabilityNoData: No readability scores in this result (too little body text or an older snapshot).
domainResult.structureDomainSubtitle: Heading hierarchy across all scanned pages
domainResult.structureCardMultipleH1Intro: URLs where more than one H1 was detected.
domainResult.structureCardSkippedIntro: Heading level jumps (e.g. H2 to H4).
domainResult.structureCardGoodIntro: Single H1 and no skipped levels — shown when there are at most 10 matches.
domainResult.generativeSubtitle: Aggregated metrics and signals from the GEO scan across all evaluated pages.
domainResult.generativeContentIntro: FAQ structure, list and citation density — averages across pages with a GEO result.
domainResult.generativePagesIntro: GEO score, llms.txt, and schema signals. Click or press Enter to open the single-page scan.
domainResult.generativePatternsIntro: Pages missing common JSON-LD types that help AI reuse content (counts among pages with GEO extraction).
domainResult.generativeWeakestIntro: URLs with the lowest repurposing (R) dimension — prioritize structured FAQs, HowTo, and citations here.
domainResult.pageTopicsTabSubtitle: Domain-wide rollup from per-page AI tags and tiers (tier-weighted, no second LLM).
domainResult.pageTopicsEmpty: No page-level topic data yet. Run a new deep scan with classification enabled, or wait until enough pages have body text for the model.
domainResult.visualMapDescription: Nodes = scanned pages, lines = link from one page to another (from our per-page link index).
domainResult.visualMapLoadError: Could not load the link graph. Try again or reload the page.
domainResult.journeyDescription: Enter a goal (e.g. "Find product XY"). An agent simulates navigation across the scanned pages and shows the path as a flowchart.
domainResult.journeySubtitle: Enter a goal and start the journey – the agent navigates through the scanned pages.
domainResult.journeyPlaceholder: How and which pages would you visit to reach …?
domainResult.allPagesInOverview: Full sortable list of all pages is in the Overview tab.
domainResult.issuesAffectedPagesSubtitlePickGroup: Select a group on the left
domainResult.issuesEmptyPickGroupSubtitle: Click an issue group on the left to see affected URLs.
domainResult.issuesEmptyPickPageSubtitle: Click a URL in the middle column to load individual findings.
domainResult.journeyNoSteps: No steps. Start a journey with a goal.

geoEeat.title: GEO / E-E-A-T analysis
geoEeat.llmUnavailableHint: E-E-A-T and GEO fitness scoring by AI was not run (e.g. OPENAI_API_KEY not set or error). Only the technical signals above are available.
geoEeat.positionDiagramDescription: For each question, the rank of your domain in each model's answer is shown (1 = best).
geoEeat.positionDiagramTableCaption: Table: position per question and model

info.heuristicSignalsBrief: Heuristic signals from the lab scan (not real-user analytics, not legal advice).
info.dashboard: Overview of all WCAG accessibility checks you have run. Use "New Scan" to check a single page or an entire domain.
info.dashboardStats: Scans: number of checks run. Errors/Warnings/Notices: total accessibility issues found (errors = critical, warnings = medium, notices = hints).
info.scanHistory: List of your single-page scans. Each entry links to the detailed result view with issues, screenshot and metrics.
info.domainHistory: List of your domain (deep) scans. A domain scan crawls many pages of a site and shows systemic issues.
info.scanPage: Enter a URL and run an automated WCAG check. You can test a single page (immediate) or an entire domain (background).
info.scanConfig: URL: the page or site to check. Standard: WCAG level (A, AA or AAA). Engines: which tools run (axe-core, HTML CodeSniffer).
info.singleTab: Analyzes exactly one page immediately. Best for quick checks and detailed single-page results including screenshot.
info.deepTab: Crawls the whole domain in the background. Finds recurring issues across many pages.
info.journeyTab: Browser agent that navigates the site and completes a natural-language task (e.g. find product, add to cart).
info.standard: WCAG 2.x level: A = minimum, AA = recommended for most sites, AAA = highest. Choose based on your compliance target.
info.engines: axe-core and HTML CodeSniffer are established accessibility engines. Using both gives broad coverage.
info.settings: Profile, language, appearance, password and default settings for new scans.
info.profile: Name, email and optional details. The selected language applies to the whole UI.
info.appearance: Accent colour for sidebar and buttons. Affects look only, not functionality.
info.password: Change your password. You must enter your current password and confirm the new one twice.
info.session: Sign out from this device. Your scan data remains on the server.
info.scanConfigSettings: These values are used as defaults when you start a new single-page scan (WCAG level and engines).
info.about: CHECKION uses pa11y and axe-core for WCAG checks and is based on the MSQDX Design System.
info.developers: REST API for accessibility checks: integrate into CI/CD, build custom dashboards or use the micro-tools programmatically.
info.microTools: Utility endpoints: contrast ratio, readability (Flesch-Kincaid), and content extraction by selector.
info.scanData: Trigger scans and fetch results. GET = list, POST = new scan, DELETE = remove a result.
info.domainScan: A domain scan crawls your site in the background and can check unlimited pages without timeout.
info.liveProgress: Shows the progress of the running domain scan and the URLs currently being scanned.
info.scanResult: Detailed result of a single-page scan: issues found, WCAG levels, screenshot and metrics.
info.score: Overall accessibility score (0–100). Higher means fewer issues found.
info.severityTabs: Filter by severity: all issues, only errors (critical), warnings, notices, or passed rules.
info.domainResult: Result of a domain scan: aggregated issues across all pages, UX/SEO/structure and systemic issues.
info.domainScore: Score for the whole domain, based on all scanned pages.
info.systemicIssues: Issues that appear on many pages. Fixing one rule improves accessibility on all affected pages.
info.scannedPages: List of all pages scanned in this domain scan. Click to open individual results.
info.scanVerified: Summary of this scan: URL checked, device and duration. You can export the result as PDF here.
info.viewModes: Switch between issue list, UX rating, visual analysis, structure and other categories.
info.uxCxCheck: Rating and recommendations based on UX and accessibility data (including AI summary if enabled).
info.uxAudit: Aggregated UX metrics (e.g. CLS, readability) across all scanned pages.
info.visualAnalysis: Screenshot with highlighted issues, focus order and touch targets for orientation.
info.saliencyHeatmap: Predicted visual attention map (MDS-ViTNet model). Not real eye-tracking data.
info.uxIssues: Concrete user experience issues detected in the scan.
info.structureSemantics: Heading hierarchy and semantic structure (headings, landmarks) of the page.
info.pageIndex: Page index: what is where on the page and how findable (rule-based). Optional saliency prominence per region after heatmap generation.
info.linksSeo: Link check (broken links) and SEO-related data (meta, keywords).
info.generativeGeo: Rating for Generative Search / GEO (Google) – how well the page is suited for AI overviews.
info.issuesList: List of accessibility issues found, with severity and WCAG level. Filter by error, warning, notice or passed.
info.eeat: E-E-A-T (Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, Trustworthiness): signals aggregated from the deep scan for trust, experience and expertise. Authoritativeness would require backlink data.
info.seoOnPage: On-page SEO from the deep scan: meta (title, description, H1, canonical), heading structure, pages without meta/keywords, and cross-page keywords.
info.pageClassification: AI-derived content classification: topic tags and tier (1–5) for importance of the main topic. Based on page content only, not URL or structure.
info.pageTopicsAggregate: Computed from all classified pages: tags are merged with weight = tier² per occurrence; common nav/footer labels are damped. No second LLM – statistics over stored tagTiers only.
info.pageTopicsCompareCard: Uses the same capped topic aggregates as the domain summary API. Compare your project’s deep scan with each competitor scan linked to this project.
info.pageTopicsCompareMatrix: One chart blends top themes from every source (your domain + competitors): same axes as single-domain view (avg tier vs. page count), fill color by highest tag tier, stroke color by source. Legend isolates one source. Clicking a bubble connects the same normalized topic across sources with a dashed line. Per source we cap themes, then cap globally by score so the chart stays readable.
info.pageTopicsLowTierDominant: Per page we count how many topic tags fall in tiers T1–T5. This metric counts pages where the sum of T1 and T2 tag counts is greater than the sum of T4 and T5 tag counts. Tier 3 is not part of this comparison. It is a heuristic for a more peripheral/boilerplate-heavy vs. core-topic tag mix—not a verdict on page quality.

projectAudionLink.title: AUDION link
projectAudionLink.description: Personas from AUDION appear in the comprehensive project report (chapter 06). The link is stored on the AUDION side.
projectAudionLink.notConfigured: AUDION integration is not configured (AUDION_API_BASE_URL / AUDION_SERVICE_TOKEN).
projectAudionLink.notConfiguredDetail: Missing on the CHECKION server: {missing}. Both must be set in Coolify on the CHECKION app service (not AUDION only).
projectAudionLink.wrongTokenHint: Note: CHECKION_INBOUND_SERVICE_TOKEN belongs on the AUDION API service — on CHECKION the counterpart is AUDION_SERVICE_TOKEN.
projectAudionLink.redeployHint: After saving env vars, redeploy/restart CHECKION, then verify /api/health (integrations.audion.configured).
projectAudionLink.reportWarning: Could not load persona data from AUDION ({detail}). You can still save the link.

reason.audion_http_405: AUDION API method not allowed — redeploy AUDION web
reason.no_audion_project_for_checkion_id: No AUDION project for this CHECKION id
reason.no_personas: Linked but no personas in AUDION

projectReport.title: Project Report
projectReport.description: Executive PDF with WCAG, SEO, rankings, GEO and competitor comparison — including AI synthesis.
projectReport.freshnessHint: See report appendix for data freshness after generation.
projectReport.historyEmpty: No reports for this project yet.
projectReport.agentStillRunning: AI agent still working — on comprehensive reports a single step can take 2–5 minutes. Progress only advances when the agent finishes.
projectReport.agentStepHint: From ~30% onward several AI agents run in sequence (WCAG, SEO, GEO, competitive …). The percentage often stays the same for minutes per step — that is expected.
projectReport.stillPolling: Connection active — status refreshes every 2 seconds.
projectReport.comprehensiveDescription: Deep analysis with individual metrics, multi-agent AI, and extended PDF (15+ min.)
